hero.title: Companies don't fail from lack of strategy.
hero.subtitle: They fail from lack of execution architecture.
hero.description: We design and deploy Governed Agentic Architecture (Proprietary D.O.A.™ Model) for complex enterprise groups.

enterprise_thesis.paragraph_1: Operational friction is normalized in large enterprise groups. Dependency on key individuals becomes invisible. Automating isolated tasks without changing the structural architecture only amplifies and accelerates chaos.

architecture.title: Governed Agentic Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Operating with agents doesn't mean adding isolated bots. It means structuring autonomous operational units under explicit rules, integrated into existing systems with auditable traceability.
card1_items: Detect deviations and trigger escalated alerts
architecture.card1_quote: "Intelligence is applied solely when classifying, validating, predicting, or responding generates structural economic value."
architecture.card2_subtitle: Agentic Operational Design (D.O.A.™) is our intervention methodology.
architecture.card2_desc: We don't optimize scattered tasks. We design operational architecture.

card2_items.title: Structural diagnosis
card2_items.desc: Deep mapping of friction and cross-departmental bottlenecks.

card2_items.title: Agentic architecture
card2_items.desc: Design of governed autonomous units and human-in-the-loop roles.

card2_items.title: Orchestration
card2_items.desc: Decision center, technical observability, and cross-platform workflow control.

erp_integration.title: D.O.A.™ Node Ecosystem
erp_integration.description: The architecture does not replace the corporate systems operating your billing and management. It unifies them, eliminating the layer of human error and friction.

testimonials.t1_quote: Companies don't fail from lack of strategy. They fail from lack of execution architecture. Friction becomes normalized... Designing execution means governing growth.
testimonials.t2_quote: At Datelia, we design execution architecture. Operational engineering is not about tools, but how execution flows within the organization... Our architecture relies on API integrations, explicit rules, auditable logs, modularity, and security.

footer.description: Operational Engineering Boutique Firm (D.O.A.™). We transform the operational debt of large groups into governed agentic execution architecture.

hero.title: AI Solutions that Drive Your Business
hero.subtitle: Beyond technology, we create solutions that solve real problems. Our approach is simple: understand your challenge and apply the right AI to generate efficiency, growth, and a measurable ROI.

chatbots.title: Agentic Response Systems
chatbots.description: Transform your service and sales architecture. We implement autonomous response systems on WhatsApp and Web that operate under corporate rules, integrating with your ERP for flawless execution.

voice_agents.title: Voice Agents for Scheduling
voice_agents.description: Eliminate the burden of phone scheduling. Our AI voice agent manages, confirms, and reschedules appointments with a natural and human voice, integrating perfectly with your calendar.

custom_ia.title: Custom AI Solutions
custom_ia.description: Does your challenge not fit into a mold? Perfect. Our motto is "implement results", and that often means building something unique. We analyze your processes and develop a personalized solution.

target_audience.title: The Architectural Filter
target_audience.description: Datelia is a high-performance firm. Our Execution Architecture (D.O.A.™) is not a generic solution; it is designed to resolve structural risks at the board level.
target_audience.is_for_item_desc: Supporting high latency and friction between departments and branches.

is_not.title: "OOTB" Software Providers
is_not.desc: We don’t sell isolated SaaS licenses expecting clients to adapt processes to the tool.

is_not.title: Micro and Functional Solutions
is_not.desc: If you are looking for a basic WhatsApp bot for a local storefront, our service will carry too much architectural friction.

is_not.title: Fast Tactical Automators
is_not.desc: We reject short-term patches. Our approach is a deep, long-term structural intervention.

live_events.title: Execution Architecture in the
live_events.description: How to govern execution in groups with multiple factories? Join our next monthly edition where we will discuss invisible structural risks and the D.O.A. model applied to your company.
live_events.agenda_desc: Limited seats to ensure deep interactivity during the final Q&A.

cta_section.title: Identify your Operational Debt
cta_section.description: It's time to stop putting out fires and start governing your execution architecture. Request a deep evaluation with our Senior Partners.

faq.title: Structural Objections
faq.description: Answers focused on security, compliance, and architectural integration for board members and IT managers.
faq.q1: How is the intervention? What is the D.O.A. process?

a1.intro: We apply the D.O.A.™ framework in three structured stages:
a1.step1_desc: We map and audit the company's critical flows. We identify corporate latency, fragile decision points, and calculate Operational Debt. We design the agentic architecture without altering current operations.
a1.step2_desc: We deploy the first layer of governed agents and integrate connectors with your ERPs (SAP, Salesforce, etc). We test the end-to-end flow in a controlled environment (Shadow Mode) before full adoption.
a1.step3_desc: We extend the architecture to the rest of the holding. A Governance Board is delivered where your board has absolute control and visibility of the decisions being made by the orchestrated agents.

faq.q2: Do you replace our ERP or Core systems?

a2.p1: Datelia designs the orchestration architecture on top of your current systems. We integrate natively via secure APIs to your ERP, CRM, or Legacy databases.
a2.p2: D.O.A.™ agents act as intelligent connectors that read, process, and write to your systems, respecting all your current corporate access rules.

faq.q3: What level of Governance and Security do you apply?

a3.p1: Our architecture is designed for SOC2-type standards and features full traceability.
a3.p2: Each D.O.A. agent operates under strict client pre-approved "guardrails" (limits). Decisions involving financial movements or high-risk changes can be configured as "Human-in-the-Loop" deployments, requiring authorization from a manager before execution.
a3.p2_strong: Your company never loses sovereignty over its data or key processes.

faq.q4: How long does a base intervention take?

a4.p1: At the Enterprise level, the model is usually implemented in windows of 12 to 16 weeks until the first architectural node is integrated and in actual production.
a4.p2: The "Structural Discovery" takes the first 3-4 weeks, being the most critical foundational milestone where we validate operational risk hypotheses and design the orchestration map.

problem_solution.title: The Problem vs. The Solution
problem_solution.subtitle: Understanding the obstacle is the first step to overcoming it. This is how we transform friction into growth.

problem.title: What is holding back my company's growth today?
problem.p1: What limits growth is usually not the market, but the internal operation: manual processes, scattered information, and little real-time visibility. This mean that each new branch, customer, or operational unit requires more work, more staff, and more coordination.
problem.strong: In that scenario, scaling becomes slow, expensive, and unsustainable.
problem.p2: Datelia solves that bottleneck by automating repetitive tasks, integrating critical information into a single panel, and standardizing the way all areas of the company work.
problem.italic: The result: less operational load, more traceability, and an operation that grows without friction.

solution.title: What exactly does Datelia do to solve these problems?
solution.p1: We apply a proven approach that combines automation, AI, and Business Intelligence to organize, accelerate, and make the operation more efficient.
solution.p2: We automate shifts, reports, data entry, customer follow-up, and internal controls. We centralize information in a single dashboard and design standardized flows that eliminate errors and duplications.
solution.roi: In similar experiences, companies achieve an ROI close to 3× in the first 60 days, with a significant reduction in manual tasks and faster, more reliable decisions.

mvp.title: What happens after the MVP?
mvp.p1: After the MVP, two key stages follow to ensure continuous improvement:
mvp.list_1: Scaling by areas (administration, sales, logistics, after-sales, operations).
mvp.list_2: Real-time BI dashboards to ensure traceability and more precise decisions.
mvp.p2: In addition, we provide continuous support, evolutionary improvements, and internal training so that the solution grows along with the company.
